free_text: more details about the experimental technique
Excitation functions for the formation of some
radioisotopes of cesium and iodine in proton and
deuteron induced nuclear reactions on natural xenon
the irradiated gas cells by cryogenic method and the
walls of the cells were rinsed with water containing
NaI, nahso3 and csno3 carriers. Gamma spectrometric
measurement for radiocesium was done using an aliquot
of the rinsing solution. Radiochemical separation was
performed in the case of radioiodine measurement.
the beam currents were determined using Cu and Al
monitor foils and faraday-cup measurements as
described in F. Tarkanyi et al. ,J,RCA,47,25,1989
the decay data were taken from C.M.Lederer and
V.S. Shirley, Table of isotopes, 7Th ed Wiley,
The total error of the cross sections was
derived as the square root of the sum of square of the
individual errors. The errors in the cross section for
data were taken from figures 1-4 of Radiochim.
